description: Letter from Yosef Ibn al-Ashqar to 'the officials of the treasury.' In Hebrew. Dating: second half of the 16th century. Concerning a wikāla containing multiple apartments and an effort to stop somebody from buying out more than half of it. On the sender, see also ENA NS I.17 (PGPID 12278) and ENA 2607.25 (PGPID 12400). Information from Avraham David's edition.
